4.gl: peace (literally or figuratively); by implication, prosperity
4.kj: one, peace, quietness, rest, + set at one again
4.dv: probably from a primary verb (to join);

9.gl: figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very
9.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

9.gl: something said (including the thought); by implication, a topic (subject of discourse), also reasoning (the mental faculty) or motive; by extension, a computation; specially, (with the article in John) the Divine Expres
9.kj: account, cause, communication, X concerning, doctrine, fame, X have to do, intent, matter, mouth, preaching, question, reason, + reckon, remove, say(-ing), shew, X speaker, speech,

10.gl: supreme in authority, i.e. (as noun) controller; by implication, Master (as a respectful title)
sacred (physically, pure, morally blameless or religious, ceremonially, consecrated)
blood, literally (of men or animals), figuratively (the juice of grapes) or specially (the atoning blood of Christ); by implication, bloodshed, also kindred

12.gl: blood, literally (of men or animals), figuratively (the juice of grapes) or specially (the atoning blood of Christ); by implication, bloodshed, also kindred

13.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
13.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

14.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
14.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);
